emails.subject: Thursday's Actions at the CPUC
emails.body: Thursday's Actions at the CPUC FYI. Just learned that California's key small consumer group, TURN, will be sending a letter to the PUC saying that it would be a violation of due process to issue on Thursday the sorts of orders the PUC is comtemplating without first giving folks a chance to comment.

emails.subject: Re: Thursday's Actions at the CPUC
emails.body: Re: Thursday's Actions at the CPUC It has been great to have you participate on the morning call. Thanks for taking the time to keep us all up to date. Thanks, Wanda Curry

emails.subject: Re: Thursday's Actions at the CPUC
emails.body: Re: Thursday's Actions at the CPUC No thanks necessary. My pleasure. I'll report back with what happens this afternoon. Best, Jeff P.S. You run a damned good meeting.
